title: Reactions at the carboxy group of an amino acid𠄔amino acid salts
abstract:
Abstract
               All the standard reactions in solution involving the carboxy group are straightforward if reagents are involved that do not affect the protected or unprotected amino group and side-chain functional groups. However, solubility problems can arise that frustrate synthetic operations with underivatized amino acids, and a number of protocols are given that illustrate ways round this problem.
